$note: Append this object to the `capabilities` array in platform/registry/capabilities.json. The registry file is NOT edited by this build; the parent session merges this entry.

capability.backing_service: Reach Fabric (lib/reach-fabric) — channel-agnostic outbound bus; console always live, Resend email + Telegram light up from env/vault, Twilio SMS + Web Push manual_required until provisioned
manual_steps: SMS (Twilio): provision a number and vault reach/twilio.* + reach/twilio.to to enable
Push (Web Push/VAPID): pair the Shay companion app, generate a VAPID keypair, vault reach/vapid.* + reach/push.subscription, and install the web-push npm package
Email and Telegram require no manual step beyond vaulting their keys; console fallback needs nothing
